hero.subtitle: Convert any conversation from Spanish or English into natural Italian. Get the result as written text or natural audio with real voices. Perfect for learning and teaching Italian.

example.label: Example generated dialogue
example.caption: Automatically generated from a conversation in Spanish

features.subtitle: A complete tool for students, teachers and Italian enthusiasts.

translation.title: Smart Translation
translation.desc: Write your dialogue in Spanish or English and our AI translates it to natural, colloquial Italian.

characters.title: Multiple Characters
characters.desc: Add all dialogue participants. Assign a name, gender and voice to each one.

written.title: Written Dialogue
written.desc: Professionally formatted result: "Marco. Ciao! Sofia. Come stai?"

audio.title: Conversational Audio
audio.desc: Generate a natural audio where each character speaks with their own ElevenLabs voice.

education.title: For Students & Teachers
education.desc: Ideal for creating listening and reading practice material in Italian classes.

download.title: Download Audio
download.desc: Download the dialogue as MP3 to use offline on any device.

step1.title: Write the dialogue
step1.desc: Enter the conversation in Spanish or English. It can involve 2 or more people.

step2.title: Set up characters
step2.desc: Assign a name, gender and ElevenLabs voice to each participant.

step3.title: Choose the format
step3.desc: Select whether you want the result as written text or conversational audio.

step4.title: Generate the dialogue!
step4.desc: The AI translates to Italian and generates the dialogue ready to use.

cta.title: Ready to learn Italian?
cta.subtitle: Join Italianto Dialogue Studio and generate your first dialogues today.

footer.tagline: Learn Italian with real dialogues generated by artificial intelligence.

step1.title: Enter the dialogue
step1.subtitle: Write or paste the conversation in Spanish or English. Clearly indicate who says what.
step1.placeholder:
Example:
A: Hi, how are you?
B: Fine thanks, and you?
A: Great. Shall we grab a coffee?
B: Sure, let's go!

step2.title: Set up characters
step2.subtitle: The names you assign here will appear in the final Italian dialogue.

step3.title: What do you want to generate?
step3.subtitle: Select the output format for the Italian dialogue.
step3.writtenDesc: Text formatted with character names. Ideal for study and reading.
step3.audioDesc: MP3 with real ElevenLabs voices. Only the conversation is heard, no names are read.

step4.title: Dialogue generated!
step4.subtitle: Your Italian dialogue is ready 🇮🇹
step4.audioNotSupported: Your browser does not support the audio element.

characters.hint: Set up each dialogue participant (min. 2, max. 6)

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Italianto — Learn Italian naturally
about.tagline: Your platform for learning Italian with AI
about.missionText: At Italianto we believe that learning Italian should be an authentic, immersive and accessible experience. Our mission is to create tools that connect students with real Italian, as it is spoken in everyday life.
about.productText1: Italianto Dialogue Studio is our tool for generating authentic Italian dialogues. Using cutting-edge artificial intelligence (Claude by Anthropic) and natural voice synthesis (ElevenLabs), we transform simple conversations into high-quality study material.
about.productText2: Whether you are a student, teacher, or simply an Italian enthusiast, Dialogue Studio helps you create practice material in seconds.
about.techTranslation: Translation: Claude (Anthropic) — AI for natural language understanding.
about.techAudio: Audio: ElevenLabs — ultra-realistic multilingual voice synthesis.
about.techPlatform: Platform: Next.js, available as a web app and Android APK.
about.contactText: Do you have questions or suggestions?
